title: El gato con botas
writer: Sergio Magaña Hidalgo, Charles Perrault, Roberto Rodríguez
plot: King Serio must give his daughter Dorita to the evil Ogre. The Lady of Time gives a pair of boots to the shepherd Juanito, who tries them on his cat. This becomes a big and helpful cat that poses as the servant of a marquis and to...
